description: `print :x is member` has no `of` keyword and no parseable collection expression to follow (issue #106). `parseIsPredicate`'s `member` branch reports the missing `of` and then unconditionally falls through into a failed collection parse, which independently re-reports the same token. The parser's end-of-parse() dedup pass (issues #106/#148) collapses that byte-identical second `ol-bad-token` finding so exactly one survives.
